name: Sea Limited
confidenceReason: Dominant position in Southeast Asia e-commerce and gaming, re-accelerating profitable growth.
bullCase: Shopee margins expand massively as competitive intensity fades, while Garena delivers highly profitable gaming cash flows to self-fund growth.
bearCase: TikTok Shop resurgence or failure to maintain gaming hit pipeline severely compresses margins.

screener.note: Cheap (0.58) but base CAGR 12% misses the 14% hurdle
